name: El Shaddai Intercontinental School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Kompleks Permata Mediterania, Jalan Pos Pengumben Raya No.40, Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: El Shaddai is a smaller Cambridge school in the Permata Mediterania area of West/South Jakarta, combining British curriculum with Christian values.
paragraphs: El Shaddai is a smaller Cambridge school in the Permata Mediterania area of West/South Jakarta, combining British curriculum with Christian values.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.9K – US$21K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Science laboratory, Library, Computer lab, Sports court, Chapel.
